mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_friend_request WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND responder_id = #{responderId} AND request_status = 0
SELECT * FROM im_friend_request WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND responder_id = #{responderId} AND request_status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_friend_request (id, requester_id, requester_name, responder_id, request_status, request_msg, request_type, notify_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{requesterId}, #{requesterName}, #{responderId}, #{requestStatus}, #{requestMsg}, #{requestType}, #{notifyStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
